rulings.Case Title: GARY E GROTE et al VS. DAVID DRIVER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 15, 2014, Line 1: COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF GARY GROTE MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD: GRANTED due to an actual conflict of interest between plaintiffs Gary Grote, Janice Grote, and Eren Hussein. See California Rules of Professional Conduct, Rule 3-310. (501/req)

rulings.Case Title: GARY E GROTE et al VS. DAVID DRIVER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 15, 2014, Line 1: COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF EREN HUSSEIN MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD: GRANTED due to an actual conflict of interest between plaintiffs Gary Grote, Janice Grote, and Eren Hussein. rulings.Case Title: ARKADY ZELIKOVSKY et al VS. 3520 BALBOA STREET OWNERS ASSOCIATION, A et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction Filed By Plaintiffs
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 15, 2014, Line 2: Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction Filed By Plaintiffs: DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain its burden. IT Corp. v. County of Imperial (1983) 35 Cal.3d. 63, 69-72. Plaintiffs did not prove that they are likely to prevail on the merits. Defendants have presented sufficient evidence of a properly held vote in levying the $1,200,000 assessment. Furthermore, Plaintiffs failed to show that they will suffer an irreparable harm. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: STERLING HEATLEY, AN INDIVIDUAL VS. SF CORNERS LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff'S Order To Show Cause Re Confirmation Of Receiver
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 15, 2014, Line 3: Plaintiff'S Application for Order To Show Cause Regarding Confirmation Of Receiver: Hearing required to address whether a receiver should be appointed. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK N.A. VS. JACK NISSIM et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 15, 2014, Line 4: PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT: Hearing required to address the motion for summary judgment separately as to Defendant Nissim and as to Defendant Siotos. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: AJLOUN ENTERPRISES, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY VS. GLEN LEIS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Expunge Lis Pendens
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 15, 2014, Line 5: PLAINTIFF AJLOUN ENTERPRISES' Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens: GRANTED. Defendant to remit $1,173.90 in attorneys fees and $60 in costs. Defendant failed to show by a preponderance of evidence a probable validity of his real property claim to 890 47th Avenue, San Francisco, CA. Defendant's tenancy does not give rise to a real property claim. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DARRYL WILLIAMS et al VS. CHARLES STEVENSON
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Reconsider Eviction As Material Misstatements Were Made To The Court Regarding Rent, Period Of Time Failure To Pay Rent
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 15, 2014, Line 6: DEFENDANT CHARLES STEVENSON'S Motion To Reconsider Eviction: OFF CALENDAR as untimely. Defendant failed to comply with the Court's August 8, 2014, order requiring him to file the moving papers on August 8, 2014. (501/REQ)
